ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: UNSEALING DOCUMENTS CONDITIONALLY LODGED UNDER SEAL
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: UNSEALING DOCUMENTS CONDITIONALLY LODGED UNDER SEAL.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling. The City and Plaintiff William McDonnell have stipulated that a document filed in this court on February 20, 2025, titled "Sequestered Documents Re: Plaintiff William McDonnell's Notice of Motion and Motion Requesting In Camera Review and Judicial Determination," was not properly filed and should be stricken from the record because it contains privileged communications. The court hereby discharges its order to show cause and strikes the filing.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
